title: Attack on Titan
author: Hajime Isayama
description: In a world where humanity lives inside cities surrounded by enormous walls to escape man-eating giants called Titans, young Eren Yeager vows revenge after a Titan destroys his hometown. An epic saga of war, freedom, and humanity's darkest secrets.

title: Fullmetal Alchemist
author: Hiromu Arakawa
description: Two alchemist brothers search for the Philosopher's Stone to restore their bodies after a forbidden ritual goes wrong. A masterfully crafted story blending action, philosophy, and deeply human themes.

title: Death Note
author: Tsugumi Ohba
description: When genius student Light Yagami discovers a supernatural notebook that kills anyone whose name is written in it, he embarks on a mission to rid the world of criminals — and a brilliant detective races to stop him.

title: Berserk
author: Kentaro Miura
description: Guts, a lone mercenary branded for death, battles monsters and demonkind while seeking revenge against his former ally Griffith. One of the most visually stunning and emotionally devastating manga ever created.

title: Demon Slayer
author: Koyoharu Gotouge
description: After his family is slaughtered by demons and his sister Nezuko is turned into one, Tanjiro Kamado becomes a Demon Slayer, vowing to find a cure and avenge his family in a breathtakingly beautiful action epic.

title: Vinland Saga
author: Makoto Yukimura
description: Set in the Viking Age, young Thorfinn seeks vengeance for his father's death while questioning what it truly means to fight and live. A powerful meditation on war, pacifism, and the search for a true home.

title: Chainsaw Man
author: Tatsuki Fujimoto
description: Denji, a poor young man who merges with his devil dog Pochita, becomes a Devil Hunter working for the government. Wildly unpredictable, emotionally raw, and unlike anything else in the manga world.

title: Spy x Family
author: Tatsuya Endo
description: A super-spy must build a fake family for a mission — adopting a child who is secretly a telepath and marrying a woman who is secretly an assassin. None of them know each other's secrets. Charming, funny, and heartwarming.

title: One Punch Man
author: ONE & Yusuke Murata
description: Saitama trained so hard he can defeat any enemy with a single punch — and now he's bored. A brilliant satire of superhero tropes with breathtaking action art by Yusuke Murata.

title: My Hero Academia
author: Kohei Horikoshi
description: In a world where nearly everyone has superpowers, Izuku Midoriya is born without any — yet dreams of becoming the world's greatest hero. A passion-filled story about courage, mentorship, and what it means to be a hero.

title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
description: On the desert planet Arrakis, young Paul Atreides navigates political intrigue, religious prophecy, and survival to fulfill his destiny. The greatest science fiction novel ever written — an unmatched feat of world-building.

title: The Name of the Wind
author: Patrick Rothfuss
description: Kvothe, the most notorious wizard of his age, tells the tale of how he went from a gifted orphan to a legendary figure feared by kings and demons alike. Masterful prose and an unforgettable narrator.

title: The Way of Kings
author: Brandon Sanderson
description: On the storm-swept world of Roshar, three unlikely heroes converge in an epic that will determine the fate of all humanity. Sanderson's Stormlight Archive begins with a staggering feat of epic fantasy.

title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: Bilbo Baggins, a peace-loving homebody, is swept into an epic quest to reclaim a dwarven homeland from the dragon Smaug alongside the wizard Gandalf. The timeless adventure that started it all.

title: Ender's Game
author: Orson Scott Card
description: In a future where Earth faces alien invasion, child soldiers are recruited and trained at Battle School. Ender Wiggin, a child of extraordinary tactical genius, may be humanity's last hope.

title: Mistborn: The Final Empire
author: Brandon Sanderson
description: The Dark Lord won a thousand years ago and has ruled ever since. Now a crew of thieves and rebels, led by Kelsier and the young Vin, will attempt the impossible: overthrow a god.

title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
author: Douglas Adams
description: Moments before Earth is demolished to make way for a hyperspace bypass, Arthur Dent is whisked into the cosmos by his alien friend Ford Prefect. The funniest and most profound book about the meaning of life ever written. The answer is 42.
